description: Security Mechanical Ethics registry for EthicBit / CEMU.

rules.description: All security-critical events must be immutably logged and independently auditable.
rules.justification: Sin registro inmutable de eventos críticos no es posible reconstruir incidentes ni demostrar integridad operativa.

rules.description: All privileged actions must be attributable to a verified identity and traceable to execution context.
rules.justification: Las acciones privilegiadas no atribuibles destruyen accountability y aumentan el riesgo de abuso interno o externo.

rules.description: Security verification outcomes must be reproducible from preserved inputs and configuration state.
rules.justification: Sin reproducibilidad de verificaciones de seguridad, la auditoría posterior pierde capacidad de confirmación técnica.
